subject: New Request: Java Developer – Fintech
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: SwiftLedger
ROLE: Senior Java Developer
START: 2024-05-23
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Malmö / hybrid
RATE: 1000 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, Azure and MySQL.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • Azure
  • MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
